text.title: Claude Advanced Features Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying claude-advanced-features produces. Captures which features were wired in, the cache hit ratio, and per-feature configuration knobs.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Forbidden patterns matched; must be empty.
budget_tokens, max_tokens; temperature MUST be absent.

forbidden.pattern: Model id without a full-date suffix (alias only).

example.note: Required fields populated; thinking max_tokens = budget + 4096; cached prefix above floor.
Alias model id (f1), prefix below 1024 (f3), and `forbidden_seen` non-empty — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
